findings.location: s4 (コンポーネント設定ファイルの記述例)
findings.description: The `<!-- 中略 -->` comment at the end of the XML example is omitted. The source includes this to indicate the component has additional properties beyond those shown. Without it, the knowledge file implies the XML snippet is a complete configuration.
findings.source_evidence:
Source XML ends with `  <!-- 中略 -->
</component>`, indicating other properties were abbreviated. The knowledge file closes the component tag immediately after the `defaultValues` property.
